name: Barbell Bench Press
proTips: Keep your feet flat on the floor.
Retract your scapula and lock your shoulders back.
Control the descent to your mid-chest.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
proTips: Set the incline angle to 30 degrees to minimize anterior deltoid dominance.
Press up and slightly inward without clanking the weights.

name: Cable Crossover
proTips: Maintain a slight bend in your elbows throughout.
Squeeze the handles together at the peak contraction like hugging a tree.

name: Deadlift
proTips: Keep the bar scraping your shins.
Brace your core using the Valsalva maneuver.
Drive through the floor with your heels.

name: Lat Pulldown
proTips: Pull down to your upper chest.
Drive down with your elbows, not your hands.
Avoid leaning back excessively.

name: Barbell Back Squat
proTips: Break at hips and knees simultaneously.
Keep knees tracking over toes.
Maintain a neutral spine under load.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
proTips: Do not flare elbows out fully; keep them in the scapular plane.
Press all the way to lockout without hyperextending lower back.

name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
proTips: Keep elbows pinned to your sides.
Supinate your wrists at the top of the movement for maximum peak contraction.

name: Hanging Knee Raise
proTips: Avoid swinging your torso.
Initiate the movement by tilting the pelvis upward, not just lifting thighs.

name: Arm Circles
proTips: Start with small circles, gradually increasing radius.
Keep torso fixed to ensure motion stays isolation within shoulders.

name: World's Greatest Stretch
proTips: Rotate through the upper back, keeping your base hip locked straight.
Exhale deeply as you reach upward.

name: Barbell Incline Variant 11
proTips: Keep structural alignment and focus directly on loading the Upper Pectoralis Major.
Maintain tight control during the eccentric phase to ensure full physical adaptation.
